description: WebSocket port configuration for CCU-Microservice communication

port_fallback_logic.description: If primary port is busy, try port+10, then port+20, then port+30

ccu_websocket_servers.description: CCU runs 6 WebSocket servers, one for each interaction module

RLAIM.description: RLA ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

TPPIM.description: TPP ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

RCMIM.description: RCM ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

JFAIM.description: JFA ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

TDIM.description: TD ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

OCMIM.description: OCM ECM connects to this CCU WebSocket server

microservice_ecm_clients.description: Microservice ECM modules connect AS CLIENTS to CCU WebSocket servers

RLA.description: RLA ECM connects to CCU RLAIM WebSocket server

TPP.description: TPP ECM connects to CCU TPPIM WebSocket server

RCM.description: RCM ECM connects to CCU RCMIM WebSocket server

JFA.description: JFA ECM connects to CCU JFAIM WebSocket server

TD.description: TD ECM connects to CCU TDIM WebSocket server

OCM.description: OCM ECM connects to CCU OCMIM WebSocket server

connection_flow.step_1: CCU starts and launches 6 WebSocket servers (RLAIM:4441, TPPIM:4442, etc.)
connection_flow.step_2: Microservices start and their ECM modules connect to respective CCU WebSocket servers
connection_flow.step_3: If primary port busy, ECM waits 5000ms then tries primary_port + 10
connection_flow.step_4: CCU sends activation commands via established WebSocket connections
connection_flow.step_5: Microservices activate their gateways and become operational

actions: Check port availability for all 6 CCU WebSocket servers
Apply port fallback logic if needed (+10, +20, +30)
Log actual ports used for each server
ECM modules attempt connection to CCU WebSocket servers
Apply ECM connection fallback logic (5000ms timeout, then +10 port)
CCU waits for all 6 microservices to connect
CCU sends activation commands via WebSocket
Microservices activate gateways and report ready
